creator: sasaki12@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

From: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: ports/161792: [PATCH] net/radiusd-cistron: add rc script
Date: Wed, 19 Oct 2011 07:09:08 +0200 (CEST)

> Synopsis: [PATCH] net/radiusd-cistron: add rc script
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: dinoex
> State-Changed-When: Wed Oct 19 07:07:28 CEST 2011
> State-Changed-Why: 
> 
> # This archive contains:
> #
> #	Makefile.diff
> #	patch-radwho.c.diff
> #	radiusd-cistron.in
> 
> radiusd-cistron.in is not changed.
> 
> radrelay-cistron.in is missing.
> Pleasee sumbit this file to this PR
> 
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=161792
> 

Sorry for my mistake. Here is the missing file.

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	radrelay-cistron.in
#
echo x - radrelay-cistron.in
sed 's/^X//' >radrelay-cistron.in << '21e8f40509a3427b6b8c1e10f9550156'
X#!/bin/sh
X
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X# PROVIDE: radrelay-cistron
X# REQUIRE: LOGIN radiusd-cistron
X# KEYWORD: shutdown
X#
X# Add the following lines to /etc/rc.conf.local or /etc/rc.conf
X# to enable this service:
X#
X# radrelay_enable (bool):	Set it to "YES" to enable radrelay.
X#				Default is "NO".
X# radrelay_flags (flags):	Set extra flags to radrelay.
X#				Default is "". see radrelay(1).
X#
X
X. /etc/rc.subr
X
Xname="radrelay"
Xrcvar=${name}_enable
X
Xcommand=%%PREFIX%%/sbin/${name}
Xpidfile=/var/run/${name}.pid
X
Xload_rc_config $name
X
X: ${radrelay_enable="NO"}
X: ${radrelay_flags=""}
X
Xrun_rc_command "$1"
21e8f40509a3427b6b8c1e10f9550156
exit

Thanks,

-- 
Fusion Communications Corp.
Kan Sasaki  sasaki@fcc.ad.jp
